description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the docker:19.03.2 image with the docker:19.03.2-dind service and global variables DOCKER_DRIVER and DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR set to overlay2 and /certs. Add a global before_script that runs docker login -u "$CI_REGISTRY_USER" -p "$CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" $CI_REGISTRY. Define a test-ci-generator job in the test stage that uses the python:3.7-alpine image, runs before_script steps cd ci-generator, python -V, pip install virtualenv, virtualenv venv, source venv/bin/activate, pip install -r requirements.txt, caches .cache/pip and ci-generator/venv/, executes coverage run -m unittest tests/test*.py, coverage report and coverage html, stores the ci-generator/htmlcov directory as an artifact, and records coverage with the regex /^TOTAL.*\s+(\d+\%)$/. Define a unity_2019_3_3f1-android job in the build stage that inherits the .build template (retry 2, script ci/build.sh), sets variables BASE_IMAGE, BUILD, COMPONENTS, DOCKERFILE_NAME, DOCKER_DRIVER, DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR, DOWNLOAD_URL, RELEASE_NOTES, RELEASE_URL, SHA1, TAG, VERSION, and runs the same ci/build.sh script to build a Unity Android image.
